{{Infobox construct
| name = Sword Sage's private void space
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sword Sage's private void space]] contains collected treasures including refining equipment, training areas, artwork, and swords.}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
